lessons.title: APIRequestContext does not support route interception — use method override instead
lessons.issue: Used page.route() to mock API, but page context is not request context, making it impossible to intercept
lessons.solution: Override service method in Arrange step: apiClient.service.method = async () => mockResponse

lessons.title: Module-level store in DatabaseHelper causes parallel tests to leak data
lessons.issue: Using const store = {} at module level causes tests running in parallel to share state
lessons.solution: Move store into class instance (private maps) so each test has isolated state

lessons.title: Mock DB pattern (in-memory) can replace real DB when no actual backend is available
lessons.issue: Need tests that work close to reality without installing PostgreSQL
lessons.solution: Use in-memory Map in EMRDatabaseHelper — Seed/Verify/Cleanup works fully, testId pattern prevents data collision
